error_signature: workflow fires multiple times on webhook trigger
title: Workflow triggers multiple times on WhatsApp webhook
symptom: The workflow is executed four times when a WhatsApp message is sent, with three of those executions happening simultaneously.
not_this_if: Webhook is not triggered by WhatsApp messages
root_cause: WhatsApp sends multiple status updates (sent, delivered, read) for each message, causing the webhook to trigger the workflow multiple times instead of just once for the actual message.
fix_steps: Add an IF node after the WhatsApp trigger
Configure the IF node to check for the presence of the message object in the payload
Connect the IF node to the subsequent nodes in the workflow
agent_instruction: Add an IF node to filter the webhook payload for actual messages.
